chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-38 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 15-04-2024 Mr. Muhammad Bux Bhanghwar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G a/w respondent No.2. O R D E R By consent, this Crl. Transfer Application is allowed. Crl. Case No. 07 of 2024 (re: State-Versus Zahid Hussain), arising out of crime No.140 of 2023, registered at P.S, Sorah under sections 468, 470, 471, 420 & 406 PPC is withdrawn from the file of Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Nara and transferred to the Court of Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-1, Kotdiji for disposal in accordance with law. However, if on the date of hearing complainant appears and accused seeks adjournment, he will have to pay cost of travel to the complainant. The application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
